programmes.show_description: Refresh your style with Wallis, now at QVC! Explore chic, contemporary fashion designed to elevate your everyday wardrobe and inspire confidence.
Discover Apricot fashion, showcasing chic wardrobe staples and elegant pieces to bring your style to life. From fabulous prints to bold pops of colours, discover how you can enliven your look today!
Ben de Lisi is bringing his gorgeous fashion aesthetic to QVC UK. With a focus on beautiful fabrics and innovative design, Ben's distinctive look is the epitome of modern elegance.
Join us for an hour of the latest fashion must-haves on QVC Style. With on-trend designs and wardrobe staples, you're sure to find something to elevate your look this season.
Join designer Kim Mendelson as she presents her latest lines. Daytime chic to evening sophistication, weekend comfort to party glamour, the Kim & Co collection is designed for every aspect of life.
